_setupSafe().details: Sets up a Safe with default parameters. The SafeInstance will have 3 owners and a threshold of 2.

_setupSafe(uint256[],uint256).details: Sets up a Safe with the given parameters.

params.ownerPKs: The public keys of the owners.

_setupSafe(uint256[],uint256,uint256).details: Sets up a Safe with the given parameters.

params.initialBalance: The initial balance of the Safe.
params.ownerPKs: The public keys of the owners.

_setupSafe(uint256[],uint256,uint256,(bo.details: Sets up a Safe with the given parameters.

params.advancedParams: The advanced parameters for the Safe initialization.
params.initialBalance: The initial balance of the Safe.
params.ownerPKs: The public keys of the owners.

getSafe(address).details: Returns the Safe instance with the given address.

params._safe: The address of the Safe instance to return.

returns._0: The Safe instance with the given address.
